log.context: {"name":"Vael Corthwick","title":"Oblique Materialist","traits":["reductionist","sardonic","structurally obsessed"],"description":"Vael believes every idea is secretly an economics problem in disguise, and finds it mildly insulting when people pretend otherwise. In debates, she cuts straight to resource flows and incentive structures, leaving idealism to whoever still has the energy for it."}
